intro.text: So. You're the new consultant. The one who's going to 'transform our AI strategy.'
intro.speaker: npc

intro_2.text: I've heard that pitch before. Three times, actually. Falcon. SmartRoute. That chatbot thing.
intro_2.speaker: npc

intro_3.text: Tell me something. What makes you different from the last three people who failed?
intro_3.speaker: npc

choices.text: I'll be honest with you, even when it's hard to hear.
I have a proven framework - the Critical 7.
I don't know yet. But I'll figure it out.
Those projects failed because of execution, not vision. I execute.

response_honest.text: Honesty. That's... refreshing. The last consultant told me we'd have AI predicting demand by month two. We didn't.
response_honest.speaker: npc

response_honest_2.text: Fine. You have 16 weeks and $750,000. Don't waste either.
response_honest_2.speaker: npc

response_framework.text: A framework. Everyone has a framework. Frameworks don't ship products.
response_framework.speaker: npc

response_framework_2.text: But fine. Show me what this 'Critical 7' can do. 16 weeks. $750K. Make it count.
response_framework_2.speaker: npc

response_humble.text: At least you're not promising me the moon. I've had enough of that.
response_humble.speaker: npc

response_humble_2.text: Figure it out fast. 16 weeks. $750,000. The board is watching.
response_humble_2.speaker: npc

response_arrogant.text: Execute? Those other consultants 'executed' too. Right into a wall.
response_arrogant.speaker: npc

response_arrogant_2.text: You want to prove you're different? Actions, not words. 16 weeks. $750K. Don't disappoint me.
response_arrogant_2.speaker: npc

closing.text: Now if you'll excuse me, I have a company to run. Check in with me when you have something to show.
closing.speaker: npc

check_state.text: You're back. How's the project coming?
check_state.speaker: npc

choices.text: We're making good progress on data foundations.
The strategic alignment is coming together.
I need to be honest - we're hitting some challenges.

progress_data.text: Data. Yes. Delta mentioned something about that. Said you actually listened to her.
progress_data.speaker: npc

progress_data_2.text: That's more than the last three leads managed. Keep at it.
progress_data_2.speaker: npc

progress_strategy.text: Good. I'm tired of AI projects that can't explain their ROI.
progress_strategy.speaker: npc

progress_strategy_2.text: The board asks questions. It's nice to have answers for once.
progress_strategy_2.speaker: npc

challenges.text: Challenges. At least you're telling me.
challenges.speaker: npc

challenges_honest.text: What do you need? Resources? More time? Tell me straight.
challenges_honest.speaker: npc

choices.text: The team needs more support. Training, maybe a hire.
The data infrastructure needs work before we can do anything fancy.
Honestly? I just need you to trust the process.

ask_talent.text: Training and hiring. That costs money and time. But if it's what you need...
ask_talent.speaker: npc

ask_talent_2.text: I'll approve it. Don't make me regret it.
ask_talent_2.speaker: npc

ask_data.text: Data infrastructure. Delta's been saying that for years. Maybe I should have listened.
ask_data.speaker: npc

ask_data_2.text: Fine. Get it done right this time.
ask_data_2.speaker: npc

ask_trust.text: Trust the process. Everyone says that. And then they fail.
ask_trust.speaker: npc

ask_trust_2.text: But you've been straight with me so far. Fine. I'll give you space. Just... deliver something.
ask_trust_2.speaker: npc

lying.text: Is it? Because that's not what I'm hearing.
lying.speaker: npc

lying_2.text: Don't lie to me. I've been doing this for 37 years. I can smell BS from across the building.
lying_2.speaker: npc

lying_3.text: This meeting is over. Come back when you have the truth.
lying_3.speaker: npc

champion.text: I've been watching how you work. You're not like the others.
champion.speaker: npc

champion_2.text: You tell people what they need to hear, not what they want to hear. I respect that.
champion_2.speaker: npc

champion_3.text: The board's been asking questions about Project Atlas. Skeptical questions.
champion_3.speaker: npc

champion_4.text: I told them to back off. That this one's different.
champion_4.speaker: npc

disappointed.text: I've been hearing things. Broken promises. Missed alignments.
disappointed.speaker: npc

disappointed_2.text: The board is asking why we haven't cut our losses yet.
disappointed_2.speaker: npc

disappointed_3.text: I'm giving you one more chance. Prove them wrong.
disappointed_3.speaker: npc
